title: Our Love Story

chapters.title: Written by God
chapters.text: From schoolmates in elementary and high school to strangers on different paths, we never imagined God was quietly writing our love story. Years later, college brought us together, and what started as simple chats on Facebook grew into a friendship full of laughter — and eventually, into a love that just feels right.

chapters.title: Our New Chapter
chapters.text: Every twist, every delay, every unexpected moment had a purpose. Now, we're ready to start this new chapter together — hand in hand, guided by faith, love, and the promise of forever.

content:
From schoolmates in elementary and high school to strangers on different paths, we never imagined God was quietly writing our love story. Years later, college brought us together, and what started as simple chats on Facebook grew into a friendship full of laughter — and eventually, into a love that just feels right.

Every twist, every delay, every unexpected moment had a purpose. Now, we're ready to start this new chapter together — hand in hand, guided by faith, love, and the promise of forever.
